title: Listen: Sportsound with Levein, McLeish, Halliday, Lennon, Neilson & Naysmith
summary: BBC's Sportsound podcast features prominent football figures discussing World Cup coverage and the Scotland manager vacancy, including perspectives from multiple former coaches and players.
content: All the World Cup and domestic football news. Who's next for the Scotland manager job?

zh.title: 收听：Sportsound 与 Levein、McLeish、Halliday、Lennon、Neilson 和 Naysmith
zh.summary: BBC 的 Sportsound 播客节目汇集了足球界知名人士，讨论世界杯报道和苏格兰队长一职的空缺，包括多位前教练和球员的观点。

title: Oxlade-Chamberlain signs new one-year Celtic deal
summary: England midfielder Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain has extended his Celtic contract for an additional year, solidifying his commitment to the Scottish club.
content: England-capped midfielder Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain signs a new one-year contract with Celtic.

zh.title: 奥克斯拉德-张伯林与凯尔特人签署新的一年合约
zh.summary: 英格兰中场球员亚历克斯·奥克斯拉德-张伯林与凯尔特人续签了一年合约，巩固了他对这支苏格兰俱乐部的承诺。

title: World Cup quiz: How well do you remember the last 32?
summary: BBC Football presents an interactive quiz challenging readers' recall of the World Cup's last-32 round, which was completed over an intense six-day period.
content: The World Cup's last-32 ties were decided in a busy six-day spell. But how closely were you paying attention?

zh.title: 世界杯问答：你对最后32强还记得多少？
zh.summary: BBC 足球频道推出互动问答，挑战读者对世界杯32强阶段的回忆，该阶段在紧张的六天内完成。

title: Williamson eyes Scotland job with McCoist on staff
summary: Former Hibernian and Kilmarnock manager Bobby Williamson candidly pursues the Scotland head coach role, proposing a management team including Ally McCoist and Scott Brown.
content: Former Hibernian and Kilmarnock manager Bobby Williamson puts himself forward for the job as Scotland head coach leading a dream team of Ally McCoist, Scott Brown and Kevin Thomson.

zh.title: 威廉森竞逐苏格兰主帅职位 麦科伊斯特将加入教练团队
zh.summary: 前希伯尼安和基尔马诺克主教练威廉森公开竞逐苏格兰国家队主帅职位，计划组建包括艾利·麦科伊斯特和斯科特·布朗在内的教练团队。

title: In spotlight but shunning limelight - Olise's unique rise to top
summary: Michael Olise, a footballer known for avoiding media attention, faces increased scrutiny following exceptional World Cup performances that may thrust him into the international spotlight.
content: A footballer who dislikes too much media attention, but Michael Olise might not have much choice if he carries on his World Cup heroics.

zh.title: 聚光灯下的低调者——奥利塞独特的崛起
zh.summary: 足球运动员迈克尔·奥利塞以低调回避媒体著称，但其在世界杯上的出色表现引发了更多关注，可能将他推向国际舞台的聚光灯下。

title: From one to 16 - ranking every team left in the World Cup
summary: BBC Sport ranks the 16 remaining World Cup teams, questioning conventional wisdom about powerhouses like Argentina and exploring the rankings of other contenders including England and Norway.
content: BBC Sport ranks the 16 teams left in the World Cup. Do Argentina deserve to be in the top three? Should Norway be higher? What about England's position?

zh.title: 从一到十六——世界杯剩余球队排名
zh.summary: 英国广播公司体育频道对世界杯剩余的16支球队进行排名，质疑人们对阿根廷等传统强队的认知，并探讨英格兰、挪威等其他球队的排名情况。

title: Brazil going out? Chris Sutton predicts World Cup's last-16 matches
summary: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton provides predictions for World Cup last-16 matches, assessing whether Brazil will be eliminated and forecasting an England-Mexico confrontation.
content: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the last-16 ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Mexico.

zh.title: 巴西会出局吗？克里斯·萨顿预测世界杯16强比赛
zh.summary: 英国广播公司体育部足球专家克里斯·萨顿对世界杯16强比赛进行预测，评估巴西是否会被淘汰，并预测英格兰与墨西哥的对阵。

title: Eight of the 10 most populous countries are not in the World Cup
summary: Analysis reveals that eight of the world's ten most populous nations are absent from the World Cup, highlighting the complex relationship between population size and international football competitiveness.
content: Many countries with massive populations consistently miss out on football’s biggest party. What can they do to change their sporting fortunes?

zh.title: 世界十大人口最多的国家中有8个不在世界杯中
zh.summary: 分析显示，全球十个人口最多的国家中有八个缺席世界杯，突显了人口规模与国际足球竞争力之间的复杂关系。

title: 'Celtic in fresh talks for Qarabag's Duran' - gossip
summary: Celtic are in advanced transfer discussions with Qarabag forward Camilo Duran, with competing Scottish clubs including Rangers, Hearts, and Aberdeen also linked to the player.
content: Celtic are reportedly close to signing Qarabag forward Camilo Duran amid transfer speculation for Aberdeen, Dundee, Hearts, Rangers and St Mirren.

zh.title: '凯尔特人与卡拉巴格的杜兰进行新一轮谈判' - 传言
zh.summary: 凯尔特人队正在与卡拉巴格前锋卡米洛·杜兰进行高级转会谈判，包括流浪者队、Hearts和Aberdeen等苏格兰竞争对手也与该球员有关联。

title: England team booed on arrival at Mexico City hotel
summary: England's squad was booed upon arriving at their Mexico City hotel ahead of the World Cup last-16 match against Mexico. The incident reflects the intensity surrounding the fixture in a Mexican venue. The reception sets the stage for a high-stakes knockout encounter between the two nations.
content: England are booed as they arrive at their Mexico City hotel to prepare for their World Cup last-16 game against Mexico.

zh.title: 英格兰队在墨西哥城酒店抵达时遭嘘声
zh.summary: 英格兰队在世界杯十六强对阵墨西哥的比赛前抵达墨西哥城酒店时遭到嘘声。这一事件反映了在墨西哥场地举行的这场比赛周围的紧张局势。这次接待为两国之间的高风险淘汰赛铺设了舞台。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 27
summary: BBC Football presents an interactive guessing game challenging readers to identify a World Cup player wearing number 27. The feature tests fans' knowledge of tournament participants using minimal clues. Players must deduce the star's identity in as few attempts as possible.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯明星27号
zh.summary: 英国广播公司足球频道推出了一个互动猜谜游戏，挑战读者识别穿着27号球衣的世界杯运动员。该功能通过最少的线索来测试球迷对锦标赛参赛者的了解程度。玩家必须在尽可能少的尝试中推断出这位明星的身份。

title: Murals, flags and beef dishes - Messi mania takes hold in Miami
summary: Lionel Messi scored his seventh World Cup goal in Argentina's victory against Cape Verde, extending his dominant tournament performance. The win sparked widespread celebration among Messi supporters in Miami, with the city adorned in murals and flags honoring the football legend. Messi's continued excellence underscores Argentina's strength in the competition.
content: Lionel Messi's World Cup goals roadshow continued with his seventh of the tournament for Argentina against Cape Verde - and delighted the fans who were in Miami to see their hero.

zh.title: 壁画、旗帜和牛肉菜肴——梅西狂热在迈阿密蔓延
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在阿根廷对阵佛得角的胜利中打进了他的第七个世界杯进球，延续了他在锦标赛中的主导表现。这场胜利在迈阿密的梅西支持者中引发了广泛的庆祝，城市里装饰着壁画和旗帜，向足球传奇人物致敬。梅西持续的卓越表现强调了阿根廷在比赛中的实力。

title: Arias strike sends Colombia into last 16 with victory over Ghana
summary: Jhon Arias scored the decisive goal as Colombia defeated Ghana 1-0 to secure the final qualification spot for the World Cup last 16. Colombia's victory in Kansas City completed the round-of-16 lineup, with Arias' strike proving the difference in a tightly contested match. The win marks Colombia's progression through a competitive group stage.
content: Jhon Arias scores the only goal of the game as Colombia become the last team to book their place in the last 16 following a 1-0 win over Ghana in Kansas City.

zh.title: 阿里亚斯进球帮助哥伦比亚击败加纳晋级16强
zh.summary: 约翰·阿里亚斯打进决定性进球，帮助哥伦比亚1-0击败加纳，获得世界杯16强的最后一个席位。哥伦比亚在堪萨斯城的胜利确保了16强阵容的完整性，阿里亚斯的进球在这场激烈的比赛中成为了关键。这场胜利标志着哥伦比亚成功从激烈的小组赛中晋级。

title: England into last 16 - what is their path to the final?
summary: BBC Sport analyzes the route England must navigate to reach the World Cup final after advancing to the last 16. The analysis examines potential opponents and the team's prospects in the knockout stage. Understanding England's path provides context for their tournament ambitions.
content: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the last 16

zh.title: 英格兰进入16强 - 他们通往决赛的道路是什么？
zh.summary: BBC体育分析了英格兰在晋级16强后为到达世界杯决赛而必须走的路线。分析研究了潜在对手和球队在淘汰赛阶段的前景。理解英格兰的路线为他们的锦标赛雄心提供了背景。

title: Farewell Cape Verde - the underdogs the World Cup will never forget
summary: Cape Verde competed as the World Cup's smallest nation but made a memorable impact before being eliminated by defending champions Argentina. Their underdog story captured global attention throughout the tournament. The team's departure marks the end of a historic World Cup run.
content: Cape Verde may have been the World Cup's smallest nation but they leave the largest impact as they depart following defeat by defending champions Argentina in an epic.

zh.title: 再见佛得角 - 世界杯永远不会忘记的黑马
zh.summary: 佛得角作为世界杯最小的国家参赛，在被卫冕冠军阿根廷淘汰前留下了深刻的印象。他们的黑马故事在整个锦标赛中吸引了全球关注。这支球队的出局标志着历史性世界杯之旅的结束。

title: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller
summary: Argentina narrowly advanced to the last 16 by defeating Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time, with Cristian Romero's deflected header proving decisive. The match showcased Cape Verde's competitive threat despite being a significantly smaller football nation. Argentina progressed after what appeared to be a genuine upset threat.
content: Argentina overcome a huge scare as they beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time thanks to a deflected header from Cristian Romero to advance to the last 16.

zh.title: 阿根廷在加时赛激战中击败佛得角
zh.summary: 阿根廷通过在加时赛中以3-2击败佛得角勉强晋级16强，克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗的折射头球成为决定性因素。这场比赛展示了佛得角尽管是一个较小足球国家仍具有的竞争威胁。阿根廷在面临真正冷门威胁后成功晋级。

title: Five and a half hours that left England's World Cup tie in chaos
summary: England's World Cup last-16 match against Mexico faced administrative chaos when kick-off time remained unconfirmed for several hours on Friday. The confusion and anger from fans and officials was eventually resolved through FIFA intervention. The incident highlighted organizational challenges during the tournament's knockout stages.
content: For several hours on Friday, no-one seemed to know when England's World Cup last-16 match against co-hosts Mexico would kick off. BBC Sport tells how a story of confusion and anger - culminating in a Fifa U-turn - unfolded.

zh.title: 五个半小时让英格兰的世界杯比赛陷入混乱
zh.summary: 英格兰与墨西哥的世界杯16强比赛周五因开球时间长时间未确认而陷入行政混乱。球迷和官员的困惑与愤怒最终通过国际足联的干预得到解决。这一事件突显了锦标赛淘汰赛阶段的组织挑战。

title: 'What a strike!' - Cabral hits brilliant goal to draw Cape Verde level in extra time
summary: Sidny Cabral scored a spectacular goal for Cape Verde in extra time to equalize against Argentina for the second time in the match. The strike demonstrated Cape Verde's attacking capability despite being heavy underdogs. The goal temporarily kept their World Cup hopes alive in a tightly contested encounter.
content: Sidny Cabral scores an incredible goal in extra time for Cape Verde as they equalise for a second time against Argentina.

zh.title: "多么漂亮的一脚！"- 卡布拉尔打入精彩进球，将佛得角扳平加时赛
zh.summary: 西德尼·卡布拉尔在加时赛中为佛得角打入精彩进球，第二次将比分扳平阿根廷。这记进球展示了佛得角尽管是不被看好的球队，但其进攻能力仍然强劲。这粒进球暂时保留了他们在一场激烈对抗中的世界杯希望。

title: Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde
summary: Lisandro Martinez restored Argentina's lead during their World Cup knockout match against Cape Verde. The goal proved crucial in Argentina's eventual progression through the tournament. Martinez's contribution helped secure victory in a closely fought contest.
content: Lisandro Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde in the knockout stage of the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 马丁内斯恢复阿根廷对阵佛得角的领先优势
zh.summary: 利桑德罗·马丁内斯在阿根廷与佛得角的世界杯淘汰赛中恢复了阿根廷的领先优势。这粒进球对阿根廷最终晋级赛事至关重要。马丁内斯的贡献帮助阿根廷在一场激烈的比赛中获得胜利。

title: Argentina stunned as Duarte equalises for Cape Verde
summary: Cape Verde surprised Argentina by equalizing through Deroy Duarte during their World Cup round of 32 match in Miami. The goal demonstrated the African nation's competitive threat against the defending champions. Duarte's strike added mounting pressure on Argentina in an unexpectedly tight knockout encounter.
content: Deroy Duarte stuns Argentina as he equalises for Cape Verde during their World Cup round of 32 match in Miami.

zh.title: 阿根廷遭遇惊人一击，杜阿尔特为佛得角扳平
zh.summary: 在迈阿密举行的世界杯32强赛中，佛得角通过德罗伊·杜阿尔特的进球令人惊讶地将比分扳平。这粒进球展示了这个非洲国家对卫冕冠军的竞争威胁。杜阿尔特的进球在一场出人意料的激烈淘汰赛中增加了对阿根廷的压力。

title: 'Sensational' Messi finish gives Argentina the lead
summary: Lionel Messi opened Argentina's scoring against Cape Verde with a highly praised finish in Miami. The goal marked Messi's strike in an eighth consecutive World Cup tournament, extending his legendary tournament-scoring streak. His early strike set the tempo for Argentina's advancement in the match.
content: Lionel Messi hits Argentina's opening goal against Cape Verde with a "sensational" finish in Miami, as he scores in an eighth consecutive World Cup game.

zh.title: 梅西"惊人"进球帮助阿根廷取得领先
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在迈阿密对阵佛得角的比赛中以备受赞誉的表现打入了阿根廷的第一球。这个进球标志着梅西在连续第八届世界杯上的进球,延续了他传奇的世界杯进球纪录。他的早期进球为阿根廷在比赛中的推进奠定了基调。
